footer.description: Personalized international education support for students in Singapore, Japan, and beyond.

assessments.title: MAP / WIDA / CAT4 Preparation
assessments.body: Targeted preparation for international school assessments.
assessments.details: MAP, WIDA, and CAT4 are commonly used by international schools to understand students’ academic level, language ability, and reasoning skills.
assessments.suitableFor: Students applying to or currently studying in international schools.

aeis.title: AEIS Preparation
aeis.body: English and Math preparation for Singapore AEIS.
aeis.details: AEIS is an entrance exam for international students who wish to apply to Singapore government schools.
aeis.suitableFor: Students planning to apply to Singapore government schools.

toefl.title: TOEFL / IELTS
toefl.body: Structured exam preparation for English proficiency tests.
toefl.details: TOEFL and IELTS are internationally recognised exams used for school admission, university application, and language assessment.
toefl.suitableFor: Students preparing for international school entry, university admission, or English proficiency requirements.

speaking.title: Speaking & Writing
speaking.body: Build clear expression and academic communication.
speaking.details: This program builds strong communication skills through structured speaking, writing, presentation, and essay practice.
speaking.suitableFor: Students who need to improve expression, writing structure, and speaking confidence.

math.title: Math Support
math.body: Grade-level math practice and concept building.
math.details: Our math support focuses on building strong conceptual understanding, problem-solving ability, and exam confidence.
math.suitableFor: Students who need support in math or want to strengthen grade-level foundations.

japanese.title: Japanese Lessons
japanese.details: We offer beginner to intermediate Japanese lessons covering grammar, vocabulary, conversation, and JLPT-style preparation.
japanese.suitableFor: Students learning Japanese for school, exams, communication, or personal development.

foundation.title: English Foundation
foundation.details: This program strengthens core English skills including grammar, vocabulary, sentence structure, and reading comprehension.
foundation.suitableFor: Students with weaker English foundations who need step-by-step support.

hero.label: Enquire
hero.title: Start your learning journey
hero.description: Tell us about your needs and we’ll recommend the most suitable plan.

process.title: What happens after you enquire
process.description: A clear and structured process designed to ensure real improvement.

step1.title: Trial Assessment
step1.text: Initial assessment by head tutor to understand level and learning style.

step2.title: Comprehensive Report
step2.text: Detailed evaluation across all key academic areas.

step3.title: Tutor Matching
step3.text: Assigned tutor based on student’s needs and goals.

step4.title: Progress Tracking
step4.text: Feedback every 3 lessons with continuous plan adjustments.

step5.title: Final Evaluation
step5.text: Clear progress comparison with graphs and next-step guidance.

hero.label: Our Approach
hero.description: Luna Education combines elite tutors, personalised planning, structured assessments, and continuous support — so students don’t just attend lessons, they improve with direction.

highlights.questionBanks: Free question banks for registered students

chat.label: Chat support
chat.message: Can I ask about this question?

comparison.label: What makes us different
comparison.title: Not just lessons. A complete learning system.

typical.title: Typical tuition
typical.point1: Random worksheets without a clear learning path
typical.point3: Parents unsure whether progress is real

luna.title: Luna Education
luna.point3: Pre-test, mid-test, and post-test quality checks
luna.point4: Tutors matched by background, subject, and student needs

values.label: Our Values
values.title: What we believe learning should be
values.description: At Luna Education, we don’t believe in random practice or passive learning. We focus on clarity, structure, and measurable improvement.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.text: Students should understand why an answer is correct, not just memorise it.

structure.title: Structure
structure.text: Learning should follow a clear path with direction and purpose.

growth.title: Growth
growth.text: Mistakes are not failures. They are signals for improvement.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.text: Students take ownership while tutors guide and challenge them.

bullets.point1: Lessons follow a clear structure instead of random topics
bullets.point2: Mistakes are tracked and reviewed systematically
bullets.point3: Students learn how to explain answers, not just give them

tutors.title: Elite tutors with international backgrounds
tutors.text: Our tutors are young, driven, and carefully selected from strong academic backgrounds. We match students with tutors who understand different school systems, countries, and exam expectations.

planning.title: Personal planning for every student
planning.text: Every student receives a customised plan based on their level, target school, exam, and weaknesses. Lessons are not random — each step is designed with a purpose.

progress.title: Progress you can actually see
progress.text: We use pre-tests, mid-tests, and post-tests to check quality and improvement. Parents can clearly understand where the student started and how they are growing.

support.title: Support beyond lesson time
support.text: Registered students receive access to question banks and chat support for learning queries, so learning continues even outside class.

questionBank.label: Registered Student Benefit
questionBank.title: Free access to curated question banks
questionBank.description: Registered students can practise with structured question banks matched to their goals. Tutors can then review mistakes and turn practice into targeted improvement.

cta.title: Start with a personalised trial lesson
cta.description: We’ll assess the student’s level and recommend the right plan based on their goals.
